excerpt: A robust fleet visibility platform allows administrators to set up strict branch hierarchies. In a properly configured system, a branch manager in Dallas only sees the equipment assigned to the Dallas yard and active Dallas jobsites. Meanwhile, the Texas Regional Manager has a view encompassing Dallas, Austin, and Houston. Finally, the executive team at Headquarters retains a "God view" of the entire national operation.
Everything from solution sets to dashboards and billing models can be tailored to your operational needs.
Customer Portal is directly integrated with RentalMan. Data flows directly between the two solutions, providing real-time updates without the need for manual data entry or imports/exports.
Logistics Solution integrates fully with RentalMan and RentalResult. This ensures your logistics operations are always aligned with rental system data.

A modern rental management system connects availability tracking, contract generation, dispatch coordination, maintenance scheduling and accounting integration into a single workflow. This means every person in the business — from the front desk taking a booking to the driver collecting equipment — is working from the same up-to-date information.
The biggest trend we see in rental software is a push to get information in the right format to the right people and let them act on it.
